name: Favorite Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Rice CHEX cereal, crushed to 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. In a large bowl, cream together peanut butter, margarine, and sugar until smooth.
4. Add the beaten egg; stir in flour and baking powder. Salt can be added if desired.
5. Stir in the crushed cereal until well combined.
6. For each cookie, roll about 1 level tablespoon of dough into a ball.
7. Place the balls on the prepared cookie sheet.
8. Using a fork dipped in sugar, flatten each cookie slightly in a criss-cross pattern.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the bottoms are lightly browned.
10. Allow to stand for 1 minute before removing from the cookie sheet.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
Makes 2 and a half dozen cookies.
